course_title: METHODS AND PRACTICUM OF TEACHING PK-12 DANCE AND GYMNASTICS
description: Methods of instruction in movement concepts, educational dance and gymnastics. Students will gain practice in planning, teaching, and assessing participants. Students will also observe, practice, and assess the facilitation skills of health and physical activity professionals. In addition, students will apply the concepts presented inKINES 370.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Physical Education andKINES 370or concurrent enrollment

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Physical Education andKINES 370or concurrent enrollment
